name: Auric Core
description: Unearth the treasures of the underground in Auric Core, a fast-paced mining strategy game where every second counts. Deep within the planet’s shifting crust, streams of Carbon and Gold flow through mechanical conveyance belts — and it’s up to you to catch, collect, and refine them before they vanish into the depths. As the Miner Commander, you’ll balance speed, timing, and precision to extract maximum value. Upgrade your mining rigs, automate your catchers, and refine your resources to unlock advanced technologies buried in the planet’s core.
